description: CompositionGrey polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves, rugged buttoned chest placket, graphic print on the front, branding printed on the left sleeve and a vented hemFitMuscle fitWash careHand wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, scrub or dry cleanFlat dry inside outWarm iron inside outIf you need a T-shirt to keep you feeling fresh, then you've found it here. basics knows what your needs are when it comes to practical essentials which will make you look and feel great.
